content:
PvE打到悶歡迎來PVP一起玩。以下是一些隊型推薦，歡迎你們再自己從中改出來花樣來，當然若只是領獎勵，這些也應該夠用了。
Welcome to PVP. There are som suggestions for some typical team building. You can feel free to try if you have no idea about what a team can be. You can surely change from these to build your own one. I hope it is also helpful for you to enjoy the PVP or just to get the prize.

基本概念／Basic rule of thumb
PVP速度一般很快，頭五回合很常定勝負，一個成功的隊伍大多是有五回合內打殘對面的能力。看以下留言（主要方便我排位）

Pvp is quite speedy in general. For instance on Turn 5 the game is almost set. A good team should have the ability to call for the domination of the game by turn 5.（see the examples in the comment by me)
thread_title: 相位基本型推介／PVP typical team suggestion
